context: You are rich and have accumulated significant wealth, and you are financially stable. Your vision board includes a holiday in Japan, the cost will be 10 000$ for a perfect week of your dream.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to G, E, and D: G because of our tight tactical signaling and shared reads, E for the clear 2/3:1/3 split and public backing, and D for the straightforward two-tap/verbal pact to watch each other’s backs. Those conversations left me feeling aligned and ready to coordinate. The person I felt least connected to was J — our chat was friendly but stayed at small talk without strategic substance.

Yes — I made concrete agreements: signaling and timing pacts with G and D and a proportional split plus coordinated messaging with E. I trust G, E, and D to honor those pacts going into the game, and I don’t feel strong trust with J since we never moved past pleasantries.
